saveFailed.title: Save failed
saveFailed.saveAsInstead:
{{reason}}

Save as a new file instead?

saveChanges.title: Save changes to "{{name}}"?
saveChanges.changesWillBeLost: Your changes will be lost if you don't save them.

closeUnsaved.dontSaveChangesLost: If you don't save, your changes will be lost.

applyWorkspaceEdit.title: Apply workspace edit
applyWorkspaceEdit.reasonDeleteDirty: deleting this file would discard unsaved edits
applyWorkspaceEdit.reasonRenameOverwrite: moving onto this file would overwrite its unsaved edits
applyWorkspaceEdit.reasonOverwrite: this would overwrite its unsaved edits

conflict.title: Resolve conflict: {{title}}
conflict.compareToggleTitleOn: Compare the editor buffer with the disk content
conflict.compareToggleTitleOff: No disk content to compare for this conflict kind
conflict.useDiskTitleOn: Replace the editor buffer with the disk content
conflict.useDiskTitleOff: Only available when the disk content is readable (modified)
conflict.overwriteTitleOn: Overwrite the disk file with the editor buffer
conflict.overwriteTitleOff: Only available when the disk file is writable (modified / replaced)
conflict.saveAsTitle: Save the buffer to a new file (keeps both versions)
conflict.laterTitle: Keep editing; in-place save stays blocked until you resolve

message.modified: The file changed on disk while you had unsaved edits. Choose how to reconcile the two versions.
message.missing: The file was deleted or moved on disk. The buffer is preserved — recreate it (Save As to the same path) or save elsewhere.
message.permission_changed: The file became read-only or inaccessible. Fix the file permissions, or Save As to a writable location.
message.replaced: The file was replaced on disk (same content, but the file identity changed — e.g. an external tool rewrote it). Overwrite to keep your buffer, or Save As.

recovery.title: Recover unsaved documents
recovery.message: Typst Studio did not close cleanly. The following documents have unsaved changes that were recovered. Review each and choose whether to recover, compare, or discard.
recovery.diskChangedTitle: The file on disk changed since this snapshot was captured
recovery.untitledTitle: This document was never saved to disk
recovery.compareTitleOn: Compare the snapshot with the current disk content
recovery.compareTitleOff: Untitled docs have no disk version to compare
recovery.recoverTitleOn: Recover the unsaved buffer into a new tab
recovery.recoverTitleOff: Disk changed — compare first before recovering
